title: Custard Keto Bouncy Delight
description: A keto-friendly Chinese-inspired dessert that combines custard and bouncy rice cake for a unique texture.

ingredients.name: kid-friendly sweetener
ingredients.notes: choose a keto-friendly option like stevia

instructions: 1. Cut the bouncy into bite-sized pieces and set aside.
2. In a medium-sized bowl, whip the friendly cream cheese until smooth.
3. Add the keto-friendly sweetener to the cream cheese and mix until combined.
4. Stir in the chinese custard until well combined.
5. Spoon the cream cheese mixture over the bouncy pieces.
7. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
